title: Self Motivation | Brendan Clark | TEDxYouth@BarnstableHS
description:
Youth speaker Brendan Clark shares his philosophy of motivation and the winning strategy.

High School student and Director, Barnstable Youth Council.

This talk was given at a TEDx event using the TED conference format but independently organized by a local community. Learn more at http://ted.com/tedx
